name: EBY ENTERPRISES INC DBA
address: 62860 BOYD ACRES RD STE C, BEND, OR 97701

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness on the property could be achieved through the introduction of additional access points to complement the current single access point. This may facilitate improved responder movement and staging options. Consider maintaining clear and marked paths within the sidewalk network to promote unobstructed navigation and responder visibility. Keeping vehicle parking areas free from obstructions may also assist responders by ensuring swift and streamlined access to key areas of the property. Thoughtful management of the landscaped area, ensuring it does not impede access routes or views, could further enhance the operational capabilities during an emergency response. These adjustments may support the effectiveness of emergency operations and responder efficiency.

wildfire.recommendations: Increasing the separation between vegetation and the structure by trimming back or selectively removing vegetation directly adjacent to the property could improve defensible space. Managing the scattered trees to maintain sufficient spacing between tree canopies could further reduce fuel continuity and potential fire spread. Pruning lower tree branches can reduce ladder fuels, thereby minimizing the risk of fire reaching higher into the tree canopy. Consistent maintenance of these elements, along with regular removal of dead or dying vegetation, may also support suppression operations and contribute to the long-term resilience of the property. Establishing these practices can enhance overall preparedness without compromising the natural landscape.
